Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril takes you on a trip to Spain as he shares his favorite meals.
Video.title: Taste of Spain

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare brunch dishes.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: For your next get together, punch up the menu with Emeril's coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp? Emeril presents two delicious recipes.
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: Did you know that Louisiana is the country's biggest producer of blue crabs? Celebrate the blue crab with Emeril's crab and corn fritters, chilled avocado soup with crab relish, and crabmeat stuffed trout with vodka butter sauce.
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: New York City firefighters turn up the heat in Emeril's kitchen.
Video.title: Turn Up the Heat

Video.summary: Emeril whips up diner favorites.
Video.title: Diner Classics

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta
Video.title: Grill It Up!

Video.summary: Emeril offers some delicious meatless entrees: udon noodle stir-fry with crunchy vegetables, hearty kale and chickpea stew, and eggplant and squash lasagna
Video.title: Vegetarian Main Courses

Video.summary: Emeril is going back to the basics. Whether you're a novice cook or an advanced chef, you'll love these recipes: vegetable soup, and roast chicken served with roasted root vegetables
Video.title: Back to Basics: Cooking School 101

Video.summary: Homemade Buttermilk, Buttermilk Fried Chicken Salad with Buttermilk Parmesan Dressing, Alden's Grandmother's Cornbread, Buttermilk Praline Ice Cream
Video.title: Cooking with Buttermilk

Video.summary: Baby Greens with Fig Vinaigrette, Jumbo Lump Crab Meat Timbale in Clear Tomato Juice, Chicken en Papillote with Spicy Carrot Jus, Fruit Stew with Oatmeal Dumplings
Video.title: Less is More

Video.summary: Fried Catfish Manchac-Style, Hush Puppies, Teriyaki Glazed Halibut with Cucumber Noodles, Emeril's Peasant-Style Monkfish, Poached Grouper with Mango Salsa
Video.title: Just for the Halibut

Video.summary: This week Emeril's throwing a Saints party at restaurant Meril with superfan Whistle Monsta.
Video.title: How New Orleans Tailgates

Video.summary: Morel and Truffle Gratin, Veal Ravioli with Morel Cream Sauce, Watercress Salad with Sherry Vinaigrette, Bass with Baby Morels and Watercress Sauce
Video.title: All About Morels and Watercress

Video.summary: Seared Beef Carpaccio with Shaved Artichokes and Truffle Oil, Salt-and-Herb-Crusted Red Snapper with Orange Salsa, Angel Food Cake with Papaya Sorbet Parfait
Video.title: The Lighter Side

Video.summary: Fresh Orange Pound Cake with Orange Glaze, Frozen Caramelized Banana and Chocolate Bomb, Lemon Mousse Cake
Video.title: Sweets for the Sweet

Video.summary: Emeril prepares satisfying soups: Cuban black bean soup, tortilla soup, and French onion soup topped with bubbling Gruyere cheese
Video.title: International Soups

Video.summary: Root for your home team with Emeril's sports party favorites: French dip sandwich, tuna poker chips, and the ultimate cheese dip - cheesy beer!
Video.title: Sports Party

Video.summary: Inspired by Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite pecan recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Aaron Sanchez enjoy a Cuban-inspired menu with a New Orleans spin.
Video.title: with Aaron Sanchez

Video.summary: Emeril and Lindsey Brower and Nan Wallis create a meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Hilda's Ravioli with Portuguese Sauce, Kale and Chorizo Soup
Video.title: Mom's Specialties

Video.summary: Smoked Trout Hash with Fried Eggs, Smoked Salmon Cakes on a Bed of Grilled Vegetables over Lemon Dill Sauce
Video.title: Cooking with Smoked Fish

Video.summary: Lamb Roast Stuffed with Spinach and Chevre, Apple Mint Couscous, Lemon Shortbread with Macerated Blueberries and Vanilla Bean Ice Cream
Video.title: Easter

Video.summary: Vegetable Quesadilla with Parsnip Puree, Onion Marmalade and Cilantro Sour Cream, Vegetable Paupiette with Vinaigrette, Celery Root Fries with Remoulade Sauce
Video.title: Creative Vegetables

Video.summary: The flavors of Philadelphia inspire; paneed pork sandwich with smothered mushrooms and herbs; grilled steak cheeses on texas toast; Steen's cane syrup shoofly pie.
Video.title: Philadelphia Eagles

Video.summary: Celebrate Cleveland's roots with a Polish-inspired tailgate menu.
Video.title: Cleveland Browns

Video.summary: For a Texan style tailgate, impress your guests with my take on the state's faves.
Video.title: Dallas Cowboys

Video.summary: At your next tailgate, go with a sure-fire southern menu of "meat and three."
Video.title: Tennessee Titans

Video.summary: So for the next tailgate, celebrate it Vegas style; truffle parmesan potato chips; cowboy steak with maitre d'butter; potato fennel gratin; pecan pie with caramel sauce.
Video.title: Las Vegas Raiders

Video.summary: Detroit Lions superfan Michael Banks and his wife, Rona, enjoy Tailgating fare.
Video.title: Detroit

Video.summary: For the next tailgate, take a cue from Emeril's home team the New Orleans Saints; Creole glazed turkey wings and poor man's french fry po' boy sandwich.
Video.title: New Orleans Saints
